sections.heading: Page 1
sections.text:
Supplementary Appropriation (2010) [No. 5 of 2012 63
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 5 of 2012
Date of Assent:12th April, 2012
An Act to confirm the supplementary expenditure of moneys
aggregating two trillion, four hundred and forty-nine billion,
eight hundred and five million , six hundred and sixty-five
thousand, eight hundred and thirty-eight kwacha required
for the services of the Republic during the financial year ended
on 31st December, 2010.
[ 16th April, 2012
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. Enactment
1. This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
(2010) Act, 2012.
2. On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it is Supplementary
appropriation
hereby confirmed that there was expended from the general revenues
of the Republic, such moneys, indicated in respect of the services
of the Republic specified in the third column of the Schedule, being
expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated for the services
of the Republic by the Appropriation Act, 2010. Act No. 52
of 2010
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K2,000
